name: Google Docs
description: Google's collaborative online word processor for creating, editing, and sharing text documents in real time.

years.notes: Refined rounded version of the blue document mark with folded top-right corner and four text lines. Used 2014-2020. Redrawn into a 24×24 viewBox via transform=scale(0.36923) over the native 47×65 source; intermediate masks collapsed to a single clip-path on the body silhouette.

Current Workspace-era mark introduced October 6, 2020. Three-line layout with the folded corner depicted as a separate darker-blue triangular flap. Redrawn into a 24×24 viewBox via transform=scale(0.27273) over the native 64×88 source.
